name: Suncorp Group Limited
analysis: SUN's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$18.7850. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$18.9900, stop A$17.1765, target A$24.4305 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
